scripts.dev:mfes: pnpm -F mfe-react build && pnpm -F mfe-vue build
scripts.dev: pnpm dev:mfes && concurrently --names 'react,vue,shell' --prefix-colors 'cyan,green,white' "pnpm -F mfe-react preview" "pnpm -F mfe-vue preview" "pnpm -F shell dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -F mfe-react build && pnpm -F mfe-vue build && pnpm -F shell build
scripts.preview: concurrently --names 'react,vue,shell' --prefix-colors 'cyan,green,white' "pnpm -F mfe-react preview" "pnpm -F mfe-vue preview" "pnpm -F shell preview"
